# Spec: Test Feature

### Requirement: Test Feature Works

The system MUST validate all input before processing.

The system should handle errors gracefully.

#### Scenario: Basic Validation

WHEN a user provides valid input
THEN the system processes it and returns a result

### Requirement: Error Handling

The system MUST return meaningful error messages.

Empty input should be rejected with a clear message.
